summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trial Period and Image Upload features. All backend API tests passed (12/12). Frontend UI correctly displays trial badges, trial buttons, checkout notices, and image upload functionality.
passed_tests: Plans endpoint returns trial_days field for all plans
Admin can set trial_days for a plan via PUT /api/plans/{id}
Image upload requires authentication (returns 401/403 without token)
Image upload POST /api/upload/image works correctly with PNG
Image upload rejects invalid file types (returns 400)
Plans with trial_days > 0 include badge info
PayPal subscription creation works for plan with trial period
Admin Plans page shows trial badge '🎁 15 días de prueba gratis'
Admin Plans page edit dialog shows 'Días de prueba gratis' input field
Subscription page shows 'Probar X días gratis' button for trial plans
Checkout section shows trial notice with correct pricing info
VCard form has 'Subir imagen' button for image upload
File input element present for image selection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trial period and image upload features are complete. Profesional plan has 15 days trial. Image upload stores files in /app/backend/uploads/. PayPal is in sandbox mode. When trial_days changes on a plan, the paypal_plan_id is automatically reset to null, requiring admin to re-sync with PayPal.

ui_elements: Trial badge on plan cards: '🎁 15 días gratis'
Checkout trial notice: '¡15 días de prueba gratis!'
Edit plan dialog: 'Días de prueba gratis' input field

paypal_integration.trial_reset_behavior: paypal_plan_id reset to null when trial_days changes
